name: kikimimi
description: 聞き耳 Kikimimi — listening-first Japanese immersion PWA (single user)

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w web && npm run typecheck -w api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w api && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.deploy: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w web && npm run deploy -w api
